TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 6, Jovenel Moïse, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) Jovenel Moïse mrhuw Haiti ta' misuw hya' ga Jovenel Moïse, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *o*enel mo*s~ɕe, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) *o*enel mo*s~ɕe mrħuw ħaiti taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *o*enel mo*s~ɕe, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 26 nqu tay 6, Jovenel Moïse, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1968) Jovenel Moïse mrhuw Haiti ta' misuw hya' ga Jovenel Moïse, aring ryax tay 7 squ byacing tay 2 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *o*enel mo*s~ɕe, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) *o*enel mo*s~ɕe mrħuw ħaiti taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *o*enel mo*s~ɕe, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
